description: Create a custom transactional email template named 'NestWell Order Confirmation' based on the default 'New Order' template. Set the subject to 'Your NestWell Home Order #{{var order.increment_id}} - Thank You!' and ensure the content includes the brand name 'NestWell Home', the support email 'support@nestwell-home.com', and the order ID variable '{{var order.increment_id}}'. Configure the store to use this new template as the 'New Order Confirmation Template' for sales emails. If not logged in, use admin / Admin1234!.
